title: ITZAMNA Thank you cards for small business customer orders packaging boutique retail handmade pink pack of 100
features: Soft pink background with elegant cursive text adds a stylish and warm touch to your packaging
Made from 300gsm coated paper, each card measures 3.5 x 2 inches same size as a business card, easy to include in packages
Smooth surface makes it easy to write messages for customers friends family or anyone you want to thank
Great for small business packaging customer appreciation or sending a kind note to loved ones
Each pack includes 100 cards great for online shops handmade sellers boutiques and small businesses
description: Send a soft and heartfelt thank you with these pink mini cards, perfect for adding a warm touch to every order. With a smooth surface that's easy to write on, they offer just enough space for a simple, handwritten message. Whether you're reaching out to customers or adding charm to your packaging, these cards tuck easily into any box, bag, or envelope. A sweet and simple way to show you care.
